title: Duplicate AND Move with one action
excerpt: Would love to be able to Duplicate AND Move an item/task in one action. For instance, re-creating an item/task that’s on one board for another board. Currently, we need to duplicate, and then move it. If this could be do…

posts.author: JenZucconi (Jennifer Zucconi)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to be able to Duplicate AND Move an item/task in one action. For instance, re-creating an item/task that’s on one board for another board. Currently, we need to duplicate, and then move it. If this could be done with one action, that would be great!
